arts.ttl: Exclusive: Man United, Liverpool & Arsenal are closely monitoring 43 G/A winger
arts.sum: Barcelona’s Brazilian star Raphinha is being closely monitored by the biggest Premier League clubs, according to Caught Offside sources. In particular, Newcastle United, Liverpool, Arsenal and Manchester United are closely following the 28-year-old winger’s successful performances in La Liga. arts.ttl: Arsenal changes for PSV Eindhoven as Calafiori and White start, Odegaard dropped
arts.sum: But at the same time, Arteta cannot go too lax with the selection; he still needs to get the result and find a way to win the game to keep the momentum up and the positivity flowing - which right now is a big challenge. arts.ttl: Player ‘has a preference’ to join Liverpool, Manchester City or Arsenal – Has chosen his PL destinations
arts.sum: Sporting star Viktor Gyökeres is eyeing a move to Liverpool, Manchester City or Arsenal in the summer window. That’s according to Tuesday’s A Bola, who state the striker favours a move to the Premier League. It’s further claimed the 26-year-old ‘has a preference’ of joining Liverpool, Manchester City or Arsenal. arts.ttl: Arsenal to announce new signing in next 48 hours
arts.sum: Arsenal are expected to announce the arrival of Andrea Berta as their new sporting director in the next 48 hours. The Italian media has now joined the English media in unanimously reporting that Berta has accepted the offer from Arsenal to become their new sporting director.
